'''9779''' was an adolescent [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] in [[Clone cadet/Legends|training]] from [[Generation Five Thousand]]. While on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]] 9779 lost his way from his ship. He and [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] met when 9779 returned the misplaced journal of Boba's [[Jango Fett/Legends|father]]. 9779 wore a [[Color/Legends|tan]] and gold learning helmet and a light blue tunic. Aurra Sing mistook him to be Fett.<ref name="MoD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Maze of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]'' {{Mo}}
